summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vibly wellness app. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 90% functional with minor UI overlay issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts button clicks, preventing normal interaction

design_issues.issue: Challenges navigation not available in bottom nav - only shows 5 items instead of expected 6+

passed_tests: All 24 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Dashboard loading with vibe score and quote
Navigation between main pages (dashboard, habits, vitals, goals, ai)
AI Coach page loading and input field
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in habit creation and add challenges navigation to bottom nav. Consider improving AI Coach response visibility.
